    Publications

    First-author Publications

    1. A Chandra survey of Milky Way globular clusters - IV. Periodic X-ray sources   Published in mnras, 2024

    2. Periodic X-ray sources in globular clusters: diagnosing dynamical formation and evolution of cataclysmic variables   Published in HEAD, 2023

    3. Periodic X-ray sources in the massive globular cluster 47 Tucanae: Evidence for dynamically formed cataclysmic variables   Published in mnras, 2023

    4. Searching for quasi-periodic oscillations in active galactic nuclei of the Chandra Deep Field South   Published in mnras, 2022

    5. Periodic X-ray sources in the Galactic bulge: application of the Gregory-Loredo algorithm   Published in mnras, 2020

    Co-author Publications

    1. Detection of X-ray emission from a bright long-period radio transient   Published in nat, 2025

    2. A sample of ionised Fe line-emitting X-ray sources in the inner Galactic disc   Published in aap, 2025

    3. A Link Between White Dwarf Pulsars and Polars: Multiwavelength Observations of the 9.36-minute Period Variable Gaia22ayj   Published in pasp, 2025

    4. Cataclysmic Variables and AM CVn Binaries in SRG/eROSITA + Gaia: Volume Limited Samples, X-Ray Luminosity Functions, and Space Densities   Published in pasp, 2025

    5. XMM-Newton and NuSTAR discovery of a likely IP candidate XMMU J173029.8textendash330920 in the Galactic disc   Published in aap, 2024

    6. Discovery of a polar candidate towards the Galactic disk: XMMU J180332.4-232230   Published in The Astronomer's Telegram, 2024

    7. Periodicity from X-ray sources within the inner Galactic disk   Published in aap, 2024

    8. A Chandra search for periodic X-ray sources in the bulge of M31   Published in mnras, 2024

    9. The high energy X-ray probe (HEX-P): Resolving the nature of Sgr A* flares, compact object binaries and diffuse X-ray emission in the Galactic center and beyond   Published in Frontiers in Astronomy and Space Sciences, 2024

    10. An Empirical Correlation of T$_rm max$-M$_rm WD$ of Dwarf Novae and the Average White Dwarf Mass in Cataclysmic Variables in the Galactic Bulge   Published in apj, 2018
